body.title: PROC_PROBE habit — cc_send stimulus, reads channel, emits probe_result
body.result: Added pe_probe() to pe_chain.py — optional post-TEST cc_send stimulus+response check; SKIP if no probe_criterion; FAIL+escalate on expected pattern miss. Seeded PROC_PROBE habit memory. 5 tests.
body.description: Seed PROC_PROBE cognitive habit: injects probe stimulus via cc_send, reads channel for response, emits probe_result into basket
